ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Continued To Aug-24-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MELENDRES ABARIENTOS and RICARDO ABARIENTOS' MOTION TO STRIKE the punitive damages allegations from the complaint is granted with twenty days leave to amend. The bare allegations that an owner of a vehicle knows that the driver will use a hand held mobile device while operating the vehicle and such a device was used by the driver are insufficient to support entitlement to punitive damages. The allegations do not address the extent of owner's knowledge or what the device was or how it was used or whether it played any role in the accident. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
